current_objective: Deep Research Upgrade — From Shallow RSS to Full-Article Intelligence

steps_completed.action: Diagnosed shallow RSS research root cause.
steps_completed.finding: Agent A drops article URLs from its output because its prompt schema only requests {title, description, points}. RSS scrapers also ignore <content:encoded> CDATA blocks which contain full article HTML.

steps_completed.action: Updated all 8 Python RSS scrapers (HN, TC, Google, OpenAI, Zoho, Meta, Netflix, AWS) to parse <content:encoded>.
steps_completed.finding: Added CONTENT_ENCODED_NS constant and full_content field extraction (up to 5000 chars) to each scraper's headline output.

steps_completed.action: Updated Agent A prompt and post-selection enrichment in agent_pipeline.py.
steps_completed.finding: Prompt now requests URL field. raw_headlines_map accumulates all RSS data during tool calls. After LLM selects topics, enrichment step recovers URLs and full_content from original RSS data.

steps_completed.action: Updated Python RAG fetcher (run_rag_content_fetcher) to use full_content before HTTP fetch.
steps_completed.finding: Priority 1: RSS content:encoded (>=200 words) used directly with chunking+embedding. Priority 2: HTTP fetch. Priority 3: description fallback.

steps_completed.action: Updated all 8 TypeScript RSS scrapers in server.ts to parse <content:encoded>.
steps_completed.finding: Added contentMatch regex, fullContent extraction, and full_content field to all scraper return types.

steps_completed.action: Updated TypeScript RAG fetcher (runRagContentFetcher) in server.ts.
steps_completed.finding: Added full_content to article type, priority 1 path uses RSS content:encoded before HTTP fetch.

steps_completed.action: Mirrored agent_pipeline.py to skill folder and ran build + simulation verification.
steps_completed.finding: npm run build: zero errors (client + server). python --simulate: pipeline completes successfully in 33s.
